commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Applies all available migrations to specified DB

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Resets specified DB and recreates it from scripts

options.name: -db
options.description: Specifies DB engine type: 'mssql' or 'pgsql' (default is 'mssql')

options.name: -p
options.description: Specifies custom target path (current folder will be used by default)

options.name: -s
options.description:
Performs "soft" reset by dropping and recreating only procedures, types, functions, and views.
Does not reset tables, schemas, users, roles, etc. or anything related to modifying the data.
Applies only to 'reset' command.

options.name: -y
options.description: Automatically submits 'yes' to all Y/N prompts
